reveal.headline: You just lived through the 2008 Global Financial Crisis.
facts: The S&P 500 fell about 57% from its October 2007 peak (1565) to its March 2009 low (676).
Lehman Brothers' collapse on Sep 15, 2008 was the largest bankruptcy in U.S. history.
Anyone who simply held on made it all back within a few years. Those who panic-sold near the bottom locked in the loss forever.
